reviews.comment:
Una pena haber cambiado al personal que ya conocía a los clientes por un sistema tan de comida rápida. Siempre fue parada obligada en mi ruta de CABA a Rosario. Ahora me da lo mismo parar en cualquier otro lado

(Translated by Google)
It's a shame they replaced the staff who knew the customers with such a fast-food system. It was always a must-stop on my route from Buenos Aires to Rosario. Now I don't care where I stop.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPcElySXBBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. Baños impecables

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Spotless bathrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyM28zbEdnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy bueno, las chicas que atienden, muy gentiles, según el día!!

(Translated by Google)
Very good, the girls who work there are very friendly, depending on the day!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPaUpyRlZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
El lugar está perfecto, el problema son los valores, no es lógico pagar un café con leche y 2 media luna para llevar $ 600. Hasta la persona que me atendió sufre vergüenza al decir el valor

(Translated by Google)
The place is perfect, the problem is the prices, it is not logical to pay $600 for a coffee with milk and 2 croissants to take away. Even the person who served me was embarrassed to say the price.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPd0ppWjhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Al paso, buena atención, baños y lugar limpio, tiene una plaza linda para descansar del viaje.

(Translated by Google)
On the way, good service, restrooms and clean place, it has a nice plaza to rest from the trip.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyNzZLMXR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar, como toda estación del ACA.  Limpio, ordenado. Tienen un lindo comedor

(Translated by Google)
Very good place, like all ACA stations. Clean and tidy. They have a nice dining area.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyNzVUaWVBEAE

reviews.comment:
Precios muy elevados en el full,  y el combustible más caro que en capital federal

(Translated by Google)
Very high prices at the full station, and fuel is more expensive than in the federal capital.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQycjhUSHZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para un descanso y comer algo

(Translated by Google)
Good place to take a break and have something to eat
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyODgyd19BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Una linda estacion.....los baños impecables la atencion ezpectacular de parte de las chicas del full de la noche ya estaban cerrando y sin embargo nos atendieron genial !!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
A lovely station... the bathrooms were spotless, and the service from the girls on the night shift was spectacular. They were already closing, but they still treated us wonderfully!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyMDdtUFZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención tanto en playa como en full. Muy limpio todo.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service both on the beach and in the store. Everything was very clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyX2RTa3dRRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Very clean restrooms. Excellent service. Prices a little high.

reviews.comment:
No tenían gas oil... Algo incomprensible para YPF y para el ACA.

They had no diesel fuel... Something incomprehensible to YPF and the ACA.
